uri.description: Calendly's stable resource identifier (also this bundle's primary key; see scheduled_events.json's uri description).

user.description: The member user's own resource uri, flattened from the raw nested user object via computed_fields.

user_name.description: Flattened from the raw nested user object via computed_fields.

user_email.description: Flattened from the raw nested user object via computed_fields.
